description: This file contains business logic services related to asset health scoring, alerting mechanisms, timeline event creation, work order status updates, and retrieval of recent timeline events within an asset management backend system.

methods.name: AlertSeverity _severity_for_health(score: float)
methods.description: Determines alert severity based on asset health score.

methods.name: str _title_for_health(score: float)
methods.description: Generates a title string based on asset health score.

methods.name: TimelineEvent create_timeline_event( db: Session, *, asset_id: int, event_type: TimelineEventType, title: str, message: Optional[str] = None, inspection_id: Optional[int] = None, alert_id: Optional[int] = None, work_order_id: Optional[int] = None, extra: Optional[dict] = None, )
list[TimelineEvent] get_recent_timeline_for_asset(db: Session, *, asset_id: int, limit: int = 50)
tuple[float,Optional[Alert]] recompute_asset_health_and_maybe_alert( db: Session, *, asset: Asset, actor: Optional[User], inspection: Optional[Inspection] = None, )
None set_work_order_status( db: Session, *, work_order: WorkOrder, to_status: WorkOrderStatus, actor: Optional[User], note: Optional[str], )

ctags.name: create_timeline_event
ctags.signature: ( db: Session, *, asset_id: int, event_type: TimelineEventType, title: str, message: Optional[str] = None, inspection_id: Optional[int] = None, alert_id: Optional[int] = None, work_order_id: Optional[int] = None, extra: Optional[dict] = None, )

ctags.name: get_recent_timeline_for_asset
ctags.pattern: /^def get_recent_timeline_for_asset(db: Session, *, asset_id: int, limit: int = 50) -> list[Timeli/

ctags.name: recompute_asset_health_and_maybe_alert
ctags.signature: ( db: Session, *, asset: Asset, actor: Optional[User], inspection: Optional[Inspection] = None, )

ctags.name: set_work_order_status
ctags.signature: ( db: Session, *, work_order: WorkOrder, to_status: WorkOrderStatus, actor: Optional[User], note: Optional[str], )
